doc_html:
CHAPTER 22-A.  OIL SPILL RELIEF PROGRAMS INTEGRITY ACT

§2165.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Oil Spill Relief Programs Integrity Act".

Acts 2010, No. 658, §1.
